user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Coca-Cola
Product type: Original classic beverage
Tone: refreshing, nostalgic, authentic
Visual style: Bold red and white color palette with classic typography and vibrant, energetic imagery that evokes happiness and togetherness.
Conceptual technique: emotional storytelling centered on shared moments and timeless enjoyment
Format: image

visual_style.typography: Classic Coca-Cola script with bold, vintage serif fonts
visual_style.imagery: Vibrant, energetic scenes of friends and family sharing joyful moments outdoors with visible Coca-Cola bottles or cans

brief.conceptual_technique: Emotional storytelling centered on shared moments and timeless enjoyment
brief.headline: Taste the Feeling of Togetherness
brief.body_copy: From every smile to every clink, Coca-Cola brings people closer. Relive the classic moments with the original, refreshing taste that never goes out of style.

visual_direction.scene_description: A sunlit picnic scene with a diverse group of friends laughing and sharing Coca-Cola bottles. The iconic red and white logo is prominently displayed on glass bottles glistening with condensation. The background is blurred to focus on the joyful expressions and the vibrant red Coke bottles on the table.
visual_direction.composition: Centered focus on the hands reaching in with Coca-Cola bottles, surrounded by warm smiles. Bold Coca-Cola script headline overlays the top portion, with the tagline and call to action at the bottom right corner in white text on a red banner.
visual_direction.lighting: Bright, natural sunlight enhancing the red hues and giving a warm glow to the scene.
